logentry-sitelockdown-activate:
{{doc-logentry|sitelockdown|activate}}

Parameters:
* $1 - the performer (with tool links)
* $2 - the performer's plain username
logentry-sitelockdown-deactivate:
{{doc-logentry|sitelockdown|deactivate}}

Parameters:
* $1 - the performer (with tool links)
* $2 - the performer's plain username
sitelockdown-active: Permission error shown to a blocked user when they try to edit or create an account while lockdown is active.
sitelockdown-error-token: Shown when the toggle form's edit token doesn't match.
sitelockdown-status-active: Shown on Special:SiteLockdown when lockdown is active. $1 is who activated it, $2 is when.
sitelockdown-status-reason: Shown below {{msg-mw|sitelockdown-status-active}} if a reason was given. $1 is the reason.
sitelockdown-status-inactive: Shown on Special:SiteLockdown when lockdown is not active.
sitelockdown-form-reason: Label for the optional reason field shown when activating lockdown.
